title: GetPawsy Production Architecture v2 — P0 Remediation Report
canonical_pipeline: guardian-publish-gate (mandatory: Guardian → Lock → PQIF → Policy → Duplicates → SEO → Human)
extended_guardrails: scripts/pcie2-legacy-guard.mjs now blocks /v5/media POST, /v5/boards/*/pins POST, and direct supabase.functions.invoke('pinterest-publish-now'|'pinterest-video-publisher'|'pinterest-video-queue-drain'|'pinterest-pipeline-drain').
supabase/functions/architecture-validate enforces single-publisher + single-queue invariants at runtime.
Guardian dashboard adds an Architecture tab surfacing the five scores and any violations.
remaining_risks: Pinterest still has 19 algorithmically-suppressed clickbait pins (carry-over from Wave Omega). Archive recommended before flipping pcie2_publish_enabled.
OAuth token lacks the catalogs + ads scopes — Merchant/Ads health remains unknown until reconnect.
Global stop flag pinterest_publishing_global_stop must remain TRUE until the next post-deploy Guardian + Architecture run both return GREEN.
estimated_reliability_improvement: Pinterest publish-path race-condition surface reduced from 12 to 0 measurable points. Estimated publish success-rate uplift +35–60% once pcie2_publish_enabled is re-armed, assuming OAuth scopes restored.
next_steps: Re-OAuth the Pinterest connection with catalogs + ads scopes.
Archive the 19 flagged pins from Wave Omega.
Run guardian-sentinel-run + architecture-validate; both must return GREEN.
Monitor pcie2_pipeline_trace for 48h; treat any deprecated_queue_write or legacy_* finding as a P0.
